zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Hengrave於大約1254年出生時，他的父親Sir Edmund de Hemgrave4歲，母親Isabella de Mutford-2歲。他於大約1287年與Isabel de Calthorpe在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1349年5月3日在英國素福爾可姆特福德享年96歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Hengrave于大约1254年出生时，他的父亲Sir Edmund de Hemgrave4岁，母亲Isabella de Mutford-2岁。他于大约1287年与Isabel de Calthorpe在英国英格兰素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1349年5月3日在英国素福爾可姆特福德享年96岁。

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Hengrave was born about 1254, his father, Sir Edmund de Hemgrave, was 4 and his mother, Isabella de Mutford, was -2. He married Isabel de Calthorpe about 1287, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 3 May 1349, in Mutford, Suffolk, England, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Hengrave est né environ 1254, son père, Sir Edmund de Hemgrave, avait 4 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Mutford, avait -2 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Calthorpe environ 1287, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 mai 1349, à Mutford, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 96 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Hengrave um 1254 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edmund de Hemgrave 4 und seine Mutter Isabella de Mutford -2. Er hat um 1287 in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Isabel de Calthorpe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Mai 1349 im Alter von 96 Jahren in Mutford, Suffolk, England.

Lui sposato Isabel de Calthorpe circa 1287, nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Hengraveが約1254年に生まれた時，父Sir Edmund de Hemgraveは4歳，母Isabella de Mutfordは-2歳であった。約1287年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズでIsabel de Calthorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1349年5月3日にイギリススフォルクムトフォードで96歳で死去した。

ko.Hengrave Hall, Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk,: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Hengrave(이)가 대략 1254년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edmund de Hemgrave(은)는 4세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de Mutford(은)는 -2세였다. 그는 대략 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 Isabel de Calthorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 5월 3일 영국 수폴크 뭇퍼드에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Hengrave nasceu aproximadamente 1254, seu pai, Sir Edmund de Hemgrave, tinha 4 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Mutford, tinha -2 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Calthorpe aproximadamente 1287, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de maio de 1349, em Mutford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 96 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Hengrave родился около 1254 г., его отцу по имени Sir Edmund de Hemgrave было 4 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Mutford, -2. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Calthorpe около 1287 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 мая 1349 г. в местности мутфорд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 96 лет.

Se casó con Isabel de Calthorpe aproximadamente 1287, en Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1349, en Mutford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 96 años.
